svg.text: Public IMF PortWatch chokepoint calls, 7-day average; latest observation 2026-06-28

g.text: Daily transit calls by broad vessel class through IMF PortWatch's Hormuz chokepoint boundary.
Vessel identity, direction, AIS-dark movements, and actual cargo onboard.
Source: IMF PortWatch Daily_Chokepoints_Data, chokepoint6; calculations by project. Capacity fields are metric-ton estimates, not barrels.
